texto: The first duty of every Starfleet officer is to the truth, whether it's scientific truth or historical truth or personal truth! It is the guiding principle on which Starfleet is based! If you can't find it within yourself to stand up and tell the truth about what happened, you don't deserve to wear that uniform!
autor: Ronald D. Moore and Naren Shankar
explicacao: Citação de Ronald D. Moore and Naren Shankar sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “The first duty of every Starfleet officer is to the truth, whether it's scientific truth or histo…” articula reflexao, duty, science-fiction em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como trabalho e science-fiction.
